issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases such as network failures or invalid API keys.
The skill contains extensive explanatory comments that may be considered verbose.
The skill assumes Linux/macOS environments and does not provide instructions for Windows.

scenarios.name: Product catalog with facets and filters
scenarios.rationale: Baseline indexes documents and searches but typically skips updateFilterableAttributes (so filters silently fail) and doesn't request facetDistribution; treatment configures searchable/filterable/sortable attributes then searches with facets and reads facetDistribution per the SKILL.md.

scenarios.name: Multi-tenant per-customer search
scenarios.rationale: Baseline proposes separate indexes per tenant or server-side filtering, missing Meilisearch's tenant-token feature; treatment uses client.generateTenantToken with index-level filter rules and expiresAt exactly as the SKILL.md documents.
